identificationModule.briefTitle: Pharmacogenomics-Guided Codeine Prescribing in Pain Management
identificationModule.officialTitle: A Randomized Study of PGx-Guided vs Standard Codeine Prescribing

descriptionModule.briefSummary: This study evaluates the impact of pharmacogenomics-guided codeine prescribing on pain outcomes and adverse events in patients with CYP2D6 variants.
Evaluating pre-surgical CYP2D6 genotyping for personalized analgesic selection.
